title: Agents: AI That Gets Things Done
summary: A chatbot answers a question. An agent takes a goal and works toward it by planning, using tools, checking results, and trying again until the job is done.

context.headline: From one answer to a working loop
context.description: An agent is an LLM placed inside a loop: it plans, acts through tools, looks at what happened, and decides the next step, repeating until the goal is reached. This loop powers many coding assistants and research tools, and it is worth understanding precisely because the term is often used loosely.
context.when: Today's biggest AI buzzword, made concrete
